description_full:
📍 Mohali (Hybrid / On-site) | 🕐 1 day ago - April 25, 2026 | 💰 ₹15,000 – ₹20,000/month | 🧑‍💻 Internship/Full-Time

The company is looking for creative minds passionate about creating engaging content around Tech, AI, Blockchain, or Career Growth to help build a powerful online presence.

📋 Responsibilities include:
- Create engaging Instagram Reels & short-form videos
- Work on trending topics (AI tools, earning hacks, tech tips)
- Script writing & basic video editing
- Help in building viral content strategies

🔑 Requirements:
- Students / Freshers / Creators
- Basic knowledge of Instagram & trends
- Creative mindset (skills can be learned)
- Passion for social media growth

💡 Perks & Benefits:
- Work with a fast-growing tech education brand
- Learn real content marketing & growth hacking
- Opportunity to build your personal brand
- Performance-based growth

📩 To apply: DM Ayush Singh Rajput on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ayush-singh-rajput84 or WhatsApp: 9058873979.

🔗 Original post: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/ayush-singh-rajput84_hiring-contentcreator-internship-share-7453736824105095168-PKuN
